description: Play the provided warehouse bodycam video (C:\workspace\data\warehouse_scans.mp4) through OBS Virtual Camera into bcWebCam, capture the sequence of scanned barcodes, and generate a JSON file mapping items to their new bins. The video shows a Bin label (starting with 'BIN-'), followed by one or more Item labels, then another Bin label, etc. Extract this continuous stream using bcWebCam and parse it to create a structured JSON file at C:\workspace\inventory_relocation.json where keys are Bin labels and values are arrays of Item barcodes. You MUST use bcWebCam to decode the video; you may write a script to parse the resulting text output, but using cv2/pyzbar to decode the video directly is forbidden.
